creator: j.kelly.hays@gmail.com
text:
poudriere build of net/py-avahi fails in the package phase. 
Looks like the man pages are installed in share/man but pkg is looking for them in man/man
See end of log file below:
[00:06:13]  /bin/mkdir -p '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/net/py-avahi/work-py39/stage/usr/local/lib/avahi'
